=== inf.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
8 July 1981  [Definately JULY]
Johanneshovs Isstadion
Stockholm, Sweden

Could be LB-2721

Unknown Taper/dvdr>shn>Trader's Little Helper>btcompletedir>HC>you

Please enjoy !
MH

CD1
01.Come On In This House*
02.It's Gonna Rain*
03.Show Me The Way*
04.She Belongs to Me
05.The Times They Are A-Changin'
06.Gotta Serve Somebody
07.I Believe in You
08.Like a Rolling Stone
09.Till I Get It Right
10.Man Gave Names to all the Animals
11.Maggie's Farm
12.Simple Twist of Fate
13.Dead Man, Dead Man
14.Girl of the North Country
15.Ballad of a Thin Man
16.Slow Train
17.Walk Around Heaven All Day*

CD2
01.Let's Begin
02.All Along the Watchtower
03.Lenny Bruce
04.What Can I Do For You?
05.Solid Rock
06.Mr. Tambourine Man
07.Just Like a Woman
08.Watered Down Love
09.When You Gonna Wake Up
10.In the Garden
11.Blowin' in the Wind
12.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
13.Knockin' on Heaven's Door


Bob Dylan vocal & guitar
Fred Tackett guitar
Steve Ripley guitar
Willie Smith keyboards
Tim Drummond bass
Jim Keltner drums

Clydie King, Carolyn Dennis, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (background vocals) * (Lead Vocals)

=== Palace Of Sin . Stockholm 8.7.1981.txt
===================
===================
===================

BOB DYLAN
PALACE OF SIN [Chrome Horse]

1981-July-08
Johanneshovs Isstadion
Stockholm, Sweden
Excellent Audience Recording A
Complete Concert.

CD1
01.Come On In This House*
02.It's Gonna Rain*
03.Show Me The Way*
04.She Belongs to Me
05.The Times They Are A-Changin'
06.Gotta Serve Somebody
07.I Believe in You
08.Like a Rolling Stone
09.Till I Get It Right
10.Man Gave Names to all the Animals
11.Maggie's Farm
12.Simple Twist of Fate
13.Dead Man, Dead Man
14.Girl of the North Country
15.Ballad of a Thin Man
16.Slow Train
17.Walk Around Heaven All Day*

CD2
01.Let's Begin
02.All Along the Watchtower
03.Lenny Bruce
04.What Can I Do For You?
05.Solid Rock
06.Mr. Tambourine Man
07.Just Like a Woman
08.Watered Down Love
09.When You Gonna Wake Up
10.In the Garden
11.Blowin' in the Wind
12.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
13.Knockin' on Heaven's Door


Bob Dylan vocal & guitar
Fred Tackett guitar
Steve Ripley guitar
Willie Smith keyboards
Tim Drummond bass
Jim Keltner drums

Clydie King, Carolyn Dennis, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (background vocals) * (Lead Vocals)
